CustomField.formula: IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(Flosum__Status__c, 'Completed') , Flosum__Tests_Failed__c = 0, Flosum__Error_Message__c = '' ) , IMAGE('/resource/'+$Setup.Flosum__Credentials__c.Flosum__Namespace__c+'IconsUtility/Passed.png', 'No issues', 30, 150) , IF( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Flosum__Status__c, 'Completed') ), IMAGE('/resource/'+$Setup.Flosum__Credentials__c.Flosum__Namespace__c+'IconsUtility/Progress.png', 'In progress', 30, 150), IMAGE('/resource/'+$Setup.Flosum__Credentials__c.Flosum__Namespace__c+'IconsUtility/Failed.png', 'Issues found', 30, 150)))
CustomField.label: Result
